examples: Perhaps there is less to fight about, with the country in a period of tranquility and the dangers of drug abuse and other unwholesome behavior well known.
The fish were unwholesome and old.
Yes, it leads to unwholesome karma.
Develop an unwholesome relationship with the Perspex mini-mannequin lighting at the Soho Hotel in London?
In a 2007 survey by the Department of Education, 88% of home-schooling parents said that their local public schools were unsafe, drug-ridden or unwholesome in some way.
